examples: We reject both naturalistic and theistic evolution.
It is not theistic, and it does not accept supernatural views of reality.
Perhaps, then, the categories of 'theistic' and 'atheistic' are not really appropriate here.
We have enough troubles being attacked by the Atheists-Evolutionists and the Theistic Evolutionists, without having to address our own Creationists.
While it is very much true that ID Theory does acknowledge conjectures regarding extraterrestrial intervention, there is no assertion whatsoever of any theistic or supernatural causation is required.
